description: Unsupervised clustering for mixed-type tabular data using RobustScaler + OneHotEncoder preprocessing, PCA to 30 components, and GaussianMixture with full covariance. Model selection via BIC across n_components=5..20 to automatically determine the number of clusters. Outputs cluster labels relabeled to consecutive integers.
